title: Republic Services: A Fundamental Misunderstanding
text: Republic Services has held up incredibly well over the past several months, easily outperforming the broader market. This has been driven by continued strong performance and the view by investors of the company as a force of stability.

title: Republic Services (RSG) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Rise Y/Y
text: Republic Services' (RSG) third-quarter 2022 earnings and revenues surge year over year.

title: Republic Services, Inc. (RSG) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE:RSG ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 27, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Aaron Evans - Vice President, Investor Relations Jon Vander Ark - Chief Executive Officer Brian DelGhiaccio - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Tyler Brown - Raymond James Toni Kaplan - Morgan Stanley Noah Kaye - Oppenheimer Kevin Chang - CIBC Michael Hoffman - Stifel Walter Spracklin - RBC Capital Markets Jerry Revich - Goldman Sachs Sean Eastman - KeyBanc Capital Markets Kyle White - Deutsche Bank David Manthey - Baird Stephanie Moore - Jefferies Michael Feniger - Bank of America Operator Good afternoon and welcome to the Republic Services Third Quarter 2022 Investor Conference Call. Republic Services is traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol RSG.

title: Republic Services (RSG) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Republic Services (RSG) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 10.74% and 1.93%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Republic Services, Inc. Reports Third Quarter 2022 Results
text: Third Quarter Total Revenue Growth of 23 Percent Includes Approximately 12 Percent Growth from Acquisitions Reported Earnings Per Share of $1.32 Increased Adjusted Earnings Per Share 20 Percent Over the Prior Year to $1.34 Generated Year-to-Date Cash Flow from Operations of $2,383 million and Adjusted Free Cash Flow of $1,665 million Certified as a Great Place to Work® for the Sixth Consecutive Year PHOENIX , Oct. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE: RSG) today reported net income of $416.9 million, or $1.32 per diluted share, for the three months ended September 30, 2022, versus $350.3 million, or $1.10 per diluted share, for the comparable 2021 period. Excluding certain benefits and expenses, on an adjusted basis, net income for the three months ended September 30, 2022 was $425.4 million, or $1.34 per diluted share, versus $357.7 million, or $1.12 per diluted share, for the comparable 2021 period.
